title: Bare Bones x Fresh Music Discs
description: Bare Bones textures for Fresh Music Discs ! 💿
body:
This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures to [Fresh Music Discs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-music-discs)

You have to place it above the default Fresh Music Discs in the resource pack list

- [Bare Bones x Mods](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-mods) is available !
